description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: MTR Train service enhancement during New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港鐵新年期間加強服務

2024-12-30T10:44:00.CONTENT_EN: To make trips more convenient during the festive season, MTR have added extra train trips and adjusted service hours as follows: New Year's Eve (31 December) ​ · All local lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line) · Disneyland Resort Line service hours will be extended · Service hours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54) · East Rail Line service to/from Lo Wu will be extended · East Rail Line service to/from Lok Ma Chau will not be extended There will be a total of 2,200 extra train trips between 20 December and 1 January. The Island Line and South Island Line will operate at an increased frequency of approximately 3-4 minutes most of the time during the weekends and holidays. The Airport Express will provide addition early and late train trips as follows: · 1 January: the first train will depart from Hong Kong Station at 5:30am · 1 January: the last train will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00am the next day Crowd management measures may be implemented in stations. Please refer to the latest service updates.
2024-12-30T10:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 為方便乘客外出歡度佳節，港鐵服務安排如下： 除夕夜（12月31日）​ ·本地鐵路綫及7條輕鐵路綫通宵行駛（不包括機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫往返羅湖及落馬洲站） ·迪士尼綫延長服務時間 ·3條巴士綫（506、K51及K54）延長服務時間 ·東鐵綫往返羅湖站延長服務 ·東鐵綫往返落馬洲站不會延長服務 此外，12月20日至1月1日期間，部分本地鐵路綫於不同時段加密列車班次，總共增加2200班列車，其中港島綫及南港島綫於周末及假日大部份時間將加密至約3至4分鐘一班車。 而機場快綫會作出以下特別安排，方便出行旅客： ·1月1日：香港站頭班車提前於早上05:30開出 ·1月1日：博覽館站尾班車延至翌日凌晨01:00開出 部分車站在人多時或會實施客流管理措施，請留意最新車務資訊。
